libs-calibration.title: FIRST LIGHT
libs-calibration.description: ChemCam spectrometer powered on. Signal noisy — calibration sequence initiated.

libs-calibration.title: BASELINE ACQUIRED
libs-calibration.description: Background emission characterized. Strongest emission lines now resolvable.

libs-calibration.title: PARTIAL SPECTRUM
libs-calibration.description: Wavelength calibration improving. Major elements identifiable — minor peaks still uncertain.

libs-calibration.title: HIGH RESOLUTION
libs-calibration.description: Spectrometer approaching full calibration. Trace element detection coming online.

libs-calibration.title: FULL LIBS CAPABILITY
libs-calibration.description: Spectrometer fully calibrated. All emission lines resolved — maximum scientific yield.

dan-prospecting.title: HYDROGEN TRACE
dan-prospecting.description: DAN detected a subsurface hydrogen anomaly. Neutron albedo shift confirmed — something is down there.

dan-prospecting.title: FIRST PROSPECT
dan-prospecting.description: Neutron survey complete. Subsurface composition analyzed — drill site assessment pending.

dan-prospecting.title: WATER ON MARS
dan-prospecting.description: Subsurface ice deposit confirmed. Drill marker placed — extraction hardware will follow.

mars-survival.title: FIRST SOL
mars-survival.description: One full Martian day and night cycle completed. Mission clock still running.

mars-survival.title: FIVE SOLS
mars-survival.description: Five sols on the surface. Radiation and cold logged — crew still operational.

mars-survival.title: TEN SOLS
mars-survival.description: Double-digit sols. Long-baseline environmental data accumulating.

mars-survival.title: FIFTY SOLS
mars-survival.description: Extended surface campaign. Mission endurance exceeds many design studies.

mars-survival.title: HUNDRED SOLS
mars-survival.description: Century sol on Mars. Sustained science operations — a landmark in surface survival.
